question_text: Which statement about particle density is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: Particles in gases are more densely packed than particles in liquids

options.label: B
options.text: Particles in solids are more densely packed than particles in liquids

options.label: C
options.text: Particles in liquids are more densely packed than particles in solids

options.label: D
options.text: All states of matter have particles packed with equal density

explanation: Solids have the tightest particle packing, followed by liquids, then gases. This is why solids and liquids are much denser than gases, and why solids are generally harder and less compressible.
